message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 3.1.0 Get Participant Callback Details

box "ML API Adapter Service" #LightBlue
participant "ML-API-ADAPTER" as ADAPTER
end box

box "Central Services" #LightYellow
participant "Central Service API" as CSAPI
participant "Participant Handler" as PH
participant "Participant DAO" as PDAO
database "Central Store" as CS
end box

group Get Callback Details
ADAPTER -> CSAPI: 1 Request to get callback details – GET – /participants/{name}/endpoints?type={typeValue}
CSAPI -> PH: 2 Fetch Callback details for Participant

PH -> PDAO: 3 Fetch Participant\n<color:red>Error code: 3200</color>
PDAO -> CS: 4 Fetch Participant
note right of CS: participant
CS --> PDAO: 5 Retrieved Participant
PDAO --> PH: 6 Return Participant
PH -> PH: 7 Validate DFSP

alt [Validate participant (success)]

PH --> CSAPI: 8 check if "type" parameter is sent

alt [Check if "type" parameter is sent (Sent)]

CSAPI -> PDAO: 9 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type\n<color:red>Error code: 3000</color>
PDAO -> CS: 10 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type
note right of PDAO
Condition:
  isActive = 1
  endpointTypeId = <type>
end note
note right of CS: participantEndpoint
CS --> PDAO: 11 Retrieved Callback details for Participant and type
PDAO --> CSAPI: 12 Return Callback details for Participant and type
note over CSAPI, PH #Yellow
Message:
{
  endpoints: {type: <type>, value: <value>}
}
end note
CSAPI --> ADAPTER: 13 Return Callback details for Participant
ADAPTER <-- CSAPI: 14 Return Callback details for Participant

else [Check if "type" parameter is sent (Not Sent)]

CSAPI -> PDAO: 15 Fetch Callback details for Participant\n<color:red>Error code: 3000</color>
PDAO -> CS: 16 Fetch Callback details for Participant
note right of PDAO
Condition:
  isActive = 1
end note
note right of CS: participantEndpoint
CS --> PDAO: 17 Retrieved Callback details for Participant
PDAO --> CSAPI: 18 Return Callback details for Participant
note over CSAPI, PH #Yellow
Message:
{
  endpoints: [
    {type: <type>, value: <value>},
    {type: <type>, value: <value>}
  ]
}
end note
CSAPI --> ADAPTER: 19 Return Callback details for Participant
ADAPTER <-- CSAPI: 20 Return Callback details for Participant

end

else [Validate participant (failure)/ Error]

note over PH #Red: Validation failure/ Error
note over PH #Yellow
Message:
{
  "errorInformation": {
    "errorCode": <errorCode>,
    "errorDescription": <ErrorMessage>,
  }
}
end note
PH --> CSAPI: 21 Return <color:red>Error code: 3000, 3200</color>
CSAPI --> ADAPTER: 22 Return <color:red>Error code: 3000, 3200</color>

end

end
@enduml
```
